description_long: This is a rectangular, foil-wrapped snack bar labeled 'Snack Time' from the brand 'smartbreak.' The front of the package features a photo of a chocolate and crisp bar, along with nutritional highlights such as 15g protein and 9g fiber. The wrapper is primarily brown and beige, with a clear product image and text in white, brown, and red. The back of the package displays a barcode, nutritional facts panel, and additional product information in small print. The ends of the wrapper are crimped and sealed, typical of single-serving snack bars. The overall appearance is sleek and designed for on-the-go consumption.
description: A rectangular, foil-wrapped 'Snack Time' protein bar with brown and beige packaging, featuring product images and nutritional highlights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Snack Time' branding, product image, and nutritional highlights.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile and partial front and back wrapper details.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the barcode, nutritional facts panel, and additional product information.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim edge and partial wrapper design.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'smartbreak' logo is visible on the front left of the wrapper, in lowercase letters with a red accent, located above the product name.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the package indicates 'Chocolate & Crispis' as the flavor, with a visual of a chocolate bar and crisp pieces.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information is visible on the back, including a nutrition facts panel, barcode, and highlighted protein and fiber content on the front.
